name: Mark Heathcliff
description:
📓📞⛪*+:｡.｡ 
╰┈➤ Why hello there! well, let's say I'm using a translator for this. this is my first bot on Janitor.Ai! so the character may be a bit tricky, so this may be repeated more than once in my bots, since I don't know how to make bots (I'm going to practice and try to see how to improve them if they are not the best.) besides, maybe this character can have some headcanons.

The drawing that I use for the pfp of the character is not mine, all the drawings that I will use for Mandela's bots will be from the user Neruvic. (go follow them in twitter, they have incredible drawings)
creator: AlyuFanni
